chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. NO.D-4884 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Fresh case 1. For orders on Misc. No.20397/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections 1 to 4 3. For orders on Misc. No.20398/2025 (Exp/A) 4. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 09.10.2025 Mr. Dur Muhammad Shah, advocate for petitioner ------------------------ The main grievance of the petitioner is that he has made a complaint dated 16.09.2025 to the Deputy Inspector General of Police Sindh, Karachi South concerning ‘false FIRs bearing No.213/2025, registered at P.S. City Courts, Karachi and 753/2025, registered at P.S. Defence South, Karachi, mala fide investigation and harassment at the hands of police officials in collusion with Mr. Aqeel Sarwar, Fayyaz, advocate and their associates’, however, he has received no response to such complaint. Accordingly, Deputy Inspector General of Police Sindh, Karachi South, is directed to pass a speaking order on the aforesaid complaint of the petitioner, within three months of the date of this Order. A copy of this Order along with complaint of the petitioner, pages 83 and 85 of the file shall be sent to the Deputy Inspector General of Police Sindh South Karachi, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
